name_cn:
Replica Miu Miu Brown
5BB148, Miu's new bowling bag, a top pick on the official site, an absolute hit🔥 this year. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front engraved logo matches the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, zippered pocket, a favorite among many stars and influencers. Dimensions 27X12X9Cm, comes with original packaging.
